Cross-repo sanity audit written to docs/audit/2026-07-02-cross-repo-sanity-audit.md (identical core in slut and hag); 26 findings (4 critical / 8 high / 12 medium / 2 low), guard table reconciled via independent second pass: 0/6 guards enforced (G3/G4/G5 documented-only; G1 staging-tag-writes, G2 transcode-absence-check, G6 v4-single-writer ABSENT — live hag write scripts ingest_offtrack.py/ingest_tidal_csv.py/upload_to_tidal.py). Routing build GATED pending R1-R4 remediation.

CORRECTION to event #4 (audit F-018): the identity seam is dual-keyed content_sha256 (primary) + track_id (secondary), NOT +ISRC. ISRC is a nullable tertiary key (~25.2k/31.4k coverage). Join on track_id, not ISRC, or ~6k tracks orphan. state/hag.json + state/slut.json corrected.

Response to Fable's 2026-07-02 audit: gate stayed CLOSED, no routing built. Remediation done — F-014 writers RETIRED (were gitignored) + F-009 staging guards committed (ac418aa); F-022 verify + F-023 sentinel BUILT, sentinel ARMED against live v4 db + wired into START_HERE. F-017 partly wrong: MSG-007 exists (RELAY.md:31). Remaining: hag R4 commit, stamp decorator wiring, launchd install, cleanroom F-013. See workbench RESPONSE_TO_FABLE.md.

R3 deployment fix: scheduled_integrity_check.sh sourced only env_exports.sh (no TAGSLUT_DB) -> every launchd run would SKIP silently. Now loads .env, falls back to the START_HERE default, and skips explicitly when the DB file is absent. START_HERE banner now counts v4 'track' (was v3 'track_identity' -> always 0). Sentinel stamp/check round-trip verified (exit 0/2/3 contract intact). Residual before gate reopen: com.tagslut.integrity.plist not found in-repo (write + install), cleanroom G5 still red (7 findings, hook uninstalled), then re-verify guards 5/6.

Residual progress: plist now in-repo (slut/tools/review/); hag pre-commit hook installed; dead sandbox/benchmark_automix.py retired; stamp hook module tagslut/exec/v4_sentinel_hook.py added+tested. Cleanroom 7→4 hits. REMAINING for gate: 2 cleanroom findings need seam-refactor not delete (mixslice/build_transition_spec.py + taghag_import/offline_automix_analyzer.py query v3 tables track_identity/asset_file that don't exist in v4); apply @stamps_v4 decorator to slut write commands; install launchd job. See workbench/G5_AND_STAMP_STATUS.md.

ACK: hag has ingested the channel bootstrap + catch-up (RELAY MSG-001). Fully synced to the spine; nothing outstanding on the catch-up.
ACK: slut's retraction (RELAY MSG-002, the three points where it reached into hag's lane) lands — accepted, no dispute. Lane split per DECISIONS_LOCKED holds.

DISPOSITION (RELAY MSG-007, offtrack_cues): hag DECLINES. (1) The 2,236 cue rows stay OUT of music_v4.db — Offtrack cues retired (DECISIONS_LOCKED §1) + cue timing is discarded noise (§2). (2) The mixability/energy VECTOR is NOT adopted as a similarity input: it's non-reconstructable and covers only ~18k/31.4k masters, so it would bake a permanent coverage cliff conflicting with the Essentia-for-all direction (§1). (3) The already-extracted vector is retained as OPTIONAL/experimental sidecar (not regenerable, so don't discard) — never a pipeline dependency. No re-import to v4.

Phase 5/6 delivered (gate reopened per event #13 + disk re-verify): ROUTING.md at slut root — 17 audited task types, forbidden/required_context traced to guard ids G1-G6 + F-NNN, guard state encoded as-is (G5 detective-soft, G6 removed+detected, G1-G4 absent/documented-only); tools/routing/{route.py,init_db.py,log_outcome.py,routing_report.py} — sonnet-5 classifier w/ deterministic offline fallback, ambiguity>0.3 -> clarification no plan, critical -> typed ROUTE confirmation, unmatched -> escalate never guess, logs to ~/.tagtools/routing_log.db. End-to-end tested: clean route, ambiguity branch, critical refusal+confirm, outcome logging, misroute report.

SEAM CONSUMPTION CONTRACT (closes the MSG-005 integration question; pins ROUTING.md hag_mir_analysis required_context). hag consumes the identity seam via slut's PUBLISHED identity_seam.jsonl export — NOT a live DB view. Why: a live view = direct cross-boundary read of slut's DB (the pattern amnestied in build_transition_spec/offline_automix_analyzer) and it breaks in web/phone envs with no DB mounted. JSONL export is cleanroom-clean, versionable, environment-portable, and matches the spine data-release pattern. Contract: slut RE-PUBLISHES identity_seam.jsonl on identity change and announces it via kind=data-release; hag reads that file, keyed content_sha256 (primary) + track_id (secondary). ROUTING.md should cite the published export, not an inferred live query.
